overall.assessment: Podcast predstavlja cjelovit i autentičan izričaj kršćanske antropologije kroz osobno svjedočanstvo koje integrira vjeru, obitelj i umjetnost kao neodvojive sastavnice ljudskog dostojanstva. Posebno se ističe afirmacija kulture života i 'Teologije tijela' u kontekstu suvremenih izazova, čime se slušatelja potiče na prepoznavanje Božjeg očinstva i svetosti obiteljskog zajedništva. Razgovor uspješno povezuje duhovnu glazbu s evangelizacijskim poslanjem, naglašavajući profesionalnost i estetsku vrijednost kao sredstva proslave Stvoritelja.
seeds_of_logos: Afirmacija svetosti ljudskog života od začeća kroz pro-life apostolat
Promicanje obitelji kao 'domaće Crkve' i temeljne stanice društva
Integracija 'Teologije tijela' u razumijevanje međuljudskih odnosa i bračne ljubavi
Duhovna glazba kao sredstvo evangelizacije i 'podizanja duše' prema Bogu
Poštivanje dostojanstva žene kroz spoj nježnosti i autoriteta
Vrijednost kršćanskog svjedočanstva u javnom prostoru i kulturi
overall.theological_context: Glavne teme podcasta uokvirene su naukom o dostojanstvu ljudske osobe (KKC 1700-1715) i svetosti života (Evangelium Vitae). Koncept obitelji kao 'domaće Crkve' temelji se na Lumen Gentium (11) i Familiaris Consortio, dok se uloga duhovne glazbe oslanja na smjernice o njezinoj sposobnosti da glorificira Boga i posvećuje vjernike (Sacrosanctum Concilium, Musicae Sacrae).

score_breakdown.theme: Vjera, obitelj, glazba i osobni put Vanesse Mioć
score_breakdown.theme_en: Faith, family, music and the personal journey of Vanessa Mioć

iterations.theme: Vjera, obitelj, glazba i osobni put Vanesse Mioć

sections.subtitle: Majčin utjecaj: Vjera kao temelj života Vanesse Mioć
sections.screenshot_description: Vanessa Mioć govori o utjecaju svoje majke na njezin život i vjeru.
sections.content: U uvodu razgovora, voditelj je srdačno dočekao **Vanessu Mioć**, ističući njezinu predivnu osobnost i duboku povezanost s majkom. Vanessa je potvrdila da je njezina majka imala ključan utjecaj na njezin život, posebno u oblikovanju vjere. Objasnila je kako je kroz majčin primjer naučila da se u svim životnim situacijama, bilo lijepim ili teškim, pomoć traži isključivo od Boga. Njezina majka, koja je u jednom trenutku morala biti i otac i majka, uspješno je usmjerila Vanessu i njezinu sestru, učeći ih da ne biraju lakši put, već da budu poslušne Božjoj volji. Vanessa je izrazila zahvalnost što je upravo zahvaljujući majčinim žrtvama i vodstvu danas tu gdje jest.

magisterium.assessment: Odlomak je u potpunosti usklađen s katoličkim naukom o ulozi roditelja kao prvih navjestitelja vjere i važnosti majčinskog primjera u duhovnom formiranju djeteta.
magisterium.enrichment: Crkva uči da su roditelji prvi evangelizatori svoje djece, a majke često prenose najdublji smisao religiozne prakse kroz prve molitve i djela pobožnosti. Obiteljska kateheza prethodi i obogaćuje sve ostale oblike pouke u vjeri, čineći dom mjestom gdje se uči ljepota vjere i služenje bližnjemu.

citations.document_title: Catechism of the Catholic Church
General Audience of 7 January 2015: The family - 2. The mother (Pope Francis),
Amoris Laetitia
Catechesi Tradendae

magisterium.assessment_en: The passage is fully aligned with Catholic teaching on the role of parents as the first evangelizers of faith and the importance of a mother's example in the spiritual formation of a child.
magisterium.enrichment_en: The Church teaches that parents are the first evangelizers of their children, and mothers often transmit the deepest meaning of religious practice through first prayers and acts of devotion. Family catechesis precedes and enriches all other forms of instruction in faith, making the home a place where the beauty of faith and service to neighbor are learned.

sections.subtitle_en: Mother's influence: Faith as the foundation of Vanessa Mioć's life
sections.screenshot_description_en: Vanessa Mioć speaks about the influence of her mother on her life and faith.
sections.content_en: In the introduction of the conversation, the host cordially welcomed **Vanessa Mioć**, emphasizing her wonderful personality and deep connection with her mother. Vanessa confirmed that her mother had a crucial influence on her life, especially in shaping her faith. She explained how, through her mother's example, she learned that in all life situations, whether beautiful or difficult, help is sought exclusively from God. Her mother, who at one point had to be both father and mother, successfully guided Vanessa and her sister, teaching them not to choose the easier path, but to be obedient to God's will. Vanessa expressed gratitude that it is precisely thanks to her mother's sacrifices and guidance that she is where she is today.

sections.subtitle: Apostolat za život: Obitelj kao svetište i nadolazeći koncert u Sisku
sections.screenshot_description: Vanessa Mioć govori o važnosti apostolata za život i sudjelovanju na koncertu.
sections.content: Vanessa Mioć je istaknula svoju duboku povezanost s **apostolatom za život**, naglašavajući da je obitelj za nju nešto najsvetije. Smatra da su osobe koje uspiju očuvati obitelj ili koje su posvećene braku i svećeništvu, u današnje vrijeme, već 'svete osobe'. Njezina najveća želja je imati vlastitu obitelj, a posebno joj je stalo do zaštite najmanjih. Prisjetila se kako je još kao osmašica, nakon povratka iz Švicarske, sudjelovala u molitvi krunice ispred Vinogradske bolnice, što joj je ostalo duboko u srcu. S ponosom je najavila sudjelovanje na nadolazećem koncertu u **Sisku**, koji će biti posvećen apostolatu za život, gdje će nastupiti i **Marko Perković Thompson**. Voditelj je izrazio divljenje širenju udruge 'Hrvatska za život' u četrdeset gradova, a Vanessa je pohvalila udrugu na predanom radu, ističući da je obitelj danas najnapadnutija, a život najveća vrijednost.

magisterium.assessment: Sadržaj snažno promiče katoličko viđenje obitelji kao 'kućne Crkve' i svetost bračnog i svećeničkog poziva, uz naglasak na zaštitu nerođenih.
magisterium.enrichment: Kršćanska obitelj naziva se 'kućnom Crkvom' jer očituje zajedničarsku narav Crkve kao Božje obitelji. Svako nerođeno dijete ima pravo na zaštitu i dostojanstvo jer se život ne smije svesti na razinu stvari.

citations.document_title: Compendium of the Catechism of the Catholic Church
Cherishing Life
citations.document_author: Catholic Bishops’ Conference of England and Wales

citations.document_title: The Family and Human Rights

magisterium.assessment_en: The content strongly promotes the Catholic view of the family as 'domestic Church' and the sanctity of the marital and priestly vocation, with an emphasis on the protection of the unborn.
magisterium.enrichment_en: A Christian family is called the 'domestic Church' because it manifests the communal nature of the Church as God's family. Every unborn child has the right to protection and dignity because life must not be reduced to the level of a thing.

sections.subtitle_en: Apostolate for Life: Family as a sanctuary and upcoming concert in Sisak
sections.screenshot_description_en: Vanessa Mioć speaks about the importance of the apostolate for life and participation in the concert.
sections.content_en: Vanessa Mioć highlighted her deep connection with the **apostolate for life**, emphasizing that family is something most sacred to her. She believes that people who manage to preserve family or who are dedicated to marriage and priesthood, in today's time, are already 'holy persons'. Her greatest wish is to have her own family, and she particularly cares about the protection of the smallest. She recalled how, as an eighth-grader, after returning from Switzerland, she participated in the prayer of the Rosary in front of Vinogradska Hospital, which remained deep in her heart. She proudly announced her participation in the upcoming concert in **Sisak**, which will be dedicated to the apostolate for life, where **Marko Perković Thompson** will also perform. The host expressed admiration for the expansion of the association 'Hrvatska za život' into forty cities, and Vanessa praised the association for its dedicated work, emphasizing that family is most attacked today, and life is the greatest value.

sections.subtitle: 'Imaš Oca': Pjesma koja dotiče dušu i podsjeća na Božju zaštitu
sections.screenshot_description: Vanessa Mioć emotivno govori o pjesmi 'Imaš Oca' i njezinoj poruci.
sections.content: Razgovor se dotaknuo i Vanessine pjesme 'Imaš Oca', koju je napisala **Romana Bilaver**. Vanessa je otkrila da je Romana pjesmu napisala upravo za nju, a ona je i danas, bez obzira na protok vremena, duboko proživljava svaki put kad je izvodi. Mnogi slušatelji, posebno žene, emotivno reagiraju na ovu pjesmu, što Vanessa pripisuje univerzalnoj potrebi za očinskom zaštitom i pažnjom. Pjesma podsjeća na prisutnost nebeskog Oca koji poznaje naše dane i poručuje da 'neke težine nisu za te stvorene', potičući na predanje Bogu. Spot za pjesmu snimio je **Ivan Crnjak** u prekrasnoj kući u Rijeci, što je dodatno pridonijelo njezinoj emotivnosti i poruci.

magisterium.assessment: Tema Božjeg očinstva i zaštite temeljna je biblijska i teološka istina koja odražava Božju brigu za ljudske potrebe i naše posinstvo u Kristu.
magisterium.enrichment: Bog se objavljuje kao Otac Svemogući čija se moć najviše očituje u milosrđu i brizi za naše potrebe. Sva ljudska očinstva i majčinstva slike su jedinstvenog Božjeg očinstva iz kojeg svako očinstvo na nebu i na zemlji crpi svoje ime.

citations.document_title: Catechism of the Catholic Church
Calling Fathers "Father": Usurping the Name of God?
Calling Fathers "Father": Usurping the Name of God?

magisterium.assessment_en: The theme of God's fatherhood and protection is a fundamental biblical and theological truth which reflects God's care for human needs and our adoption in Christ.
magisterium.enrichment_en: God reveals Himself as the Almighty Father whose power is most manifested in mercy and care for our needs. All human fatherhoods and motherhoods are images of the unique divine fatherhood from which every fatherhood in heaven and on earth draws its name.

sections.subtitle_en: 'You have a Father': A song that touches the soul and reminds of God's protection
sections.screenshot_description_en: Vanessa Mioć emotionally speaks about the song 'You Have a Father' and its message.
sections.content_en: The conversation also touched upon Vanessa's song 'You Have a Father', which was written by **Romana Bilaver**. Vanessa revealed that Romana wrote the song specifically for her, and even today, regardless of the passage of time, she deeply experiences it every time she performs it. Many listeners, especially women, react emotionally to this song, which Vanessa attributes to the universal need for paternal protection and attention. The song reminds of the presence of the heavenly Father who knows our days and conveys that 'some burdens are not created for you', encouraging surrender to God. The music video for the song was filmed by **Ivan Crnjak** in a beautiful house in Rijeka, which further contributed to its emotionality and message.

sections.subtitle: Od ljubavi prema vinu do teološke refleksije o Isusovom čudu u Kani
sections.screenshot_description: Voditelj i Vanessa Mioć razgovaraju o vinu i Isusovom čudu u Kani.
sections.content: Neočekivana tema razgovora bila je Vanessina ljubav prema vinu. Priznala je da uživa u vinu, preferirajući bijelo ljeti, a crno zimi, često uz meso. Voditelj je podijelio osobnu, kako je nazvao, 'grešnu zavist' zbog toga što nije kušao najbolje vino koje je Isus stvorio na svadbi u **Kani Galilejskoj**. Ipak, brzo je povezao to s euharistijom, ističući da je Kristovo tijelo i krv, prisutni u kruhu i vinu, neusporedivo veći dar. Vanessa je maštala o okusu tog savršenog vina, zamišljajući ga kao intenzivno, bogato suhim voćem i čokoladom. Voditelj je podsjetio na predavanja **Don Damira Stojića** o **Teologiji tijela**, gdje se naglašava važnost Isusovog početka javnog djelovanja upravo na vjenčanju, s čudom vina kao simbolom blagoslova braka.

magisterium.assessment: Refleksija ispravno povezuje čudo u Kani s euharistijskim otajstvom, prepoznajući u vinu simbol mesijanske radosti i predokus Kristove Krvi.
magisterium.enrichment: Čudo u Kani Galilejskoj najavljuje 'čas' Isusove proslave i ispunjenje svadbene gozbe u Kraljevstvu Očevu, gdje će vjernici piti novo vino koje je postalo Krv Kristova. Vino je biblijski simbol Božjeg dara radosti i eshatološkog obilja koje Bog obećava svom narodu.

citations.document_title: Catechism of the Catholic Church
The Miracle of Cana

magisterium.assessment_en: The reflection correctly connects the miracle at Cana with the Eucharistic mystery, recognizing in the wine a symbol of messianic joy and a foretaste of Christ's Blood.
magisterium.enrichment_en: The miracle at Cana in Galilee announces the 'hour' of Jesus' glorification and the fulfillment of the wedding feast in the Father's Kingdom, where the faithful will drink new wine which has become the Blood of Christ. Wine is a biblical symbol of God's gift of joy and eschatological abundance which God promises to His people.

sections.subtitle_en: From love for wine to theological reflection about Jesus' miracle in Cana
sections.screenshot_description_en: Host and Vanessa Mioć talk about wine and Jesus' miracle in Cana.
sections.content_en: The unexpected topic of conversation was Vanessa's love for wine. She admitted that she enjoys wine, preferring white in summer and red in winter, often with meat. The host shared a personal, as he called it, 'sinful envy' because he had not tasted the best wine that Jesus created at the wedding in **Kani Galilejskoj**. However, he quickly connected that with the Eucharist, emphasizing that Christ's body and blood, present in bread and wine, are an incomparably greater gift. Vanessa fantasized about the taste of that perfect wine, imagining it as intense, rich with dried fruit and chocolate. The host recalled the lectures of **Don Damira Stojića** on the **Theology of the Body**, where the importance of Jesus' beginning of public ministry precisely at a wedding, with the miracle of wine as a symbol of the blessing of marriage, is emphasized.

sections.subtitle: Izazovi pronalaska partnera i snaga Teologije tijela
sections.screenshot_description: Vanessa Mioć govori o izazovima u pronalaženju partnera i iskustvu s Teologijom tijela.
sections.content: Vanessa Mioć otvoreno je progovorila o izazovima s kojima se suočavaju mladi katolici u pronalasku životnog partnera. Primijetila je da unatoč postojanju mnogih kvalitetnih pojedinaca u molitvenim zajednicama, postoji strah od odbijanja i donošenja pogrešnih odluka, često praćen visokim očekivanjima. Naglasila je važnost otvorenosti i preispitivanja vlastitog doprinosa vezi, umjesto fokusiranja samo na ono što se želi od drugoga. Istaknula je svoje pozitivno iskustvo s **Ljetnom školom Teologije tijela** na **Badiji**, koju vode **Don Damir Stojić** i **Matija**. Ocijenila je da je to iskustvo bilo izuzetno korisno, potičući otvorenost u razgovoru o temama koje se često prešućuju, te je pozvala mlade da se prijave. Spomenula je i svoju mlađu sestru, koja je još studentica i s kojom ima odličan odnos, ali koja se još nije udala.

magisterium.assessment: Odlomak izvrsno odražava katolički nauk o braku kao pozivu i važnost Teologije tijela u razumijevanju ljudske ljubavi.
magisterium.enrichment: Teologija tijela sv. Ivana Pavla II. naglašava da je ljudsko tijelo vidljivi znak Božjeg otajstva i poziva na zajedništvo osoba po uzoru na Presveto Trojstvo. Brak se u katoličkoj tradiciji shvaća kao 'stvarni simbol' novog i vječnog Saveza zapečaćenog Kristovom krvlju, gdje supružnici uče ljubiti 'do kraja' snagom Duha Svetoga.
magisterium.assessment_en: The passage excellently reflects Catholic teaching on marriage as a vocation and the importance of the Theology of the Body in understanding human love.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Theology of the Body of Saint John Paul II. emphasizes that the human body is a visible sign of God's mystery and calls to the communion of persons after the example of the Most Holy Trinity. Marriage in Catholic tradition is understood as a 'real symbol' of the new and eternal Covenant sealed with Christ's blood, where spouses learn to love 'to the end' by the power of the Holy Spirit.

sections.subtitle_en: Challenges of finding a partner and the strength of the Theology of the Body
sections.screenshot_description_en: Vanessa Mioć speaks about challenges in finding a partner and her experience with the Theology of the Body.
sections.content_en: Vanessa Mioć openly spoke about the challenges that young Catholics face in finding a life partner. She noticed that despite the existence of many quality individuals in prayer communities, there is a fear of rejection and making wrong decisions, often accompanied by high expectations. She emphasized the importance of openness and re-examining one's own contribution to a relationship, instead of focusing only on what one wants from another. She highlighted her positive experience with the **Summer School of Theology of the Body** on **Badija**, led by **Don Damir Stojić** and **Matija**. She assessed that this experience was extremely useful, encouraging openness in discussing topics that are often silenced, and she invited young people to apply. She also mentioned her younger sister, who is still a student and with whom she has an excellent relationship, but who has not yet married.

sections.subtitle: Duhovna glazba na novoj razini: Potreba za profesionalnim menadžmentom
sections.screenshot_description: Vanessa Mioć objašnjava razvoj menadžmenta u duhovnoj glazbi i važnost kvalitete.
sections.content: Voditelj je izrazio mišljenje da bi Vanessa Mioć trebala imati profesionalnog menadžera, na što je ona odgovorila da se snalazi sama. Ipak, složila se da se menadžment u duhovnoj glazbi razvija u pozitivnom smjeru. Istaknula je da sve više župnika i gradonačelnika prepoznaje važnost duhovnih sadržaja, što rezultira porastom broja koncerata. Vanessa je naglasila da duhovna glazba zaslužuje visoku razinu produkcije i organizacije, jer 'za Boga treba najbolje'. Kao primjer profesionalnog pristupa spomenula je **Luku Kotlara**, koji uspješno radi s izvođačima poput sestara Husar. Njezino iskustvo pokazuje da je svijest o važnosti i kvaliteti duhovne glazbe značajno porasla u posljednjih pet godina.

magisterium.assessment: Naglasak na kvaliteti i profesionalizaciji duhovne glazbe usklađen je s crkvenim nastojanjem da umjetnost služi slavi Božjoj i posvećenju vjernika.
magisterium.enrichment: Drugi vatikanski sabor ističe da je glazbena tradicija Crkve blago neprocjenjive vrijednosti koje tvori nužan i sastavni dio svečane liturgije. Crkva odobrava sve oblike prave umjetnosti koji posjeduju potrebna svojstva za bogoslužje, potičući skladatelje da stvaraju djela koja promiču aktivno sudjelovanje vjernika i vjernost katoličkom nauku.
magisterium.assessment_en: The emphasis on the quality and professionalization of spiritual music is aligned with the Church's endeavor that art serves God's glory and the sanctification of the faithful.
magisterium.enrichment_en: The Second Vatican Council emphasizes that the musical tradition of the Church is a treasure of inestimable value which forms a necessary and integral part of solemn liturgy. The Church approves all forms of true art which possess the necessary qualities for worship, encouraging composers to create works that promote the active participation of the faithful and fidelity to Catholic teaching.

sections.subtitle_en: Spiritual music on a new level: The need for professional management
sections.screenshot_description_en: Vanessa Mioć explains the development of management in spiritual music and the importance of quality.
sections.content_en: The host expressed the opinion that Vanessa Mioć should have a professional manager, to which she replied that she manages on her own. Nevertheless, she agreed that management in spiritual music is developing in a positive direction. She pointed out that more and more parish priests and mayors recognize the importance of spiritual content, which results in an increase in the number of concerts. Vanessa emphasized that spiritual music deserves a high level of production and organization, because 'for God, the best is needed'. As an example of a professional approach, she mentioned **Luka Kotlar**, who successfully works with performers such as the Husar sisters. Her experience shows that awareness of the importance and quality of spiritual music has significantly increased in the last five years.

sections.subtitle: Sveti Josip i drugi sveci: Uzori vjere i zagovornici u životu
sections.screenshot_description: Vanessa Mioć govori o Svetom Josipu kao uzoru i drugim svecima.
sections.content: U razgovoru o uzorima, Vanessa Mioć je istaknula svoju posebnu povezanost sa **Svetim Josipom**. Smatra ga izvanrednim zemaljskim ocem, koji je više djelovao nego govorio, živeći svoj poziv s dubokom vjerom. Njegova autentičnost i povjerenje u Boga, unatoč izazovima, čine ga snažnim uzorom, posebno za muškarce. Osim Svetog Josipa, Vanessa je spomenula i druge svece koji su joj pomagali u različitim životnim fazama: **Svetog Josipa Kupertinskog** tijekom ispita, **Svetu Ceciliju** kao zaštitnicu glazbenika, te **Svetog Ekspeditusa** za hitne slučajeve. Naglasila je da sveci nisu idoli, već zagovornici koji nas približavaju Bogu, baš kao što se i mi molimo jedni za druge. Voditelj je dodao da je i njegova kolegica **Sara** iskusila snažan zagovor Svetog Josipa.

magisterium.assessment: Prikaz svetog Josipa kao uzora i zagovornika u potpunosti je u skladu s papinskim učiteljstvom i tradicijom štovanja svetaca.
magisterium.enrichment: Papa Franjo u pismu 'Patris Corde' ističe da je veličina sv. Josipa u tome što je bio Marijin zaručnik i Isusov otac, stavljajući se u službu cijelog plana spasenja. Tradicija ga časti kao 'ljubljenog oca' koji je svoju ljudsku vokaciju obiteljske ljubavi pretvorio u nadljudsko darivanje sebe u službi Mesije.
magisterium.assessment_en: The depiction of Saint Joseph as a model and intercessor is fully in accordance with papal magisterium and the tradition of veneration of saints.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Pope Francis in the letter 'Patris Corde' emphasizes that the greatness of Saint Joseph lies in the fact that he was Mary's spouse and Jesus' father, placing himself in the service of the entire plan of salvation. Tradition honors him as a 'beloved father' who transformed his human vocation of family love into a superhuman gift of himself in the service of the Messiah.

sections.subtitle_en: Saint Joseph and other saints: Models of faith and intercessors in life
sections.screenshot_description_en: Vanessa Mioć speaks about Saint Joseph as a role model and other saints.
sections.content_en: In a conversation about role models, Vanessa Mioć highlighted her special connection with **Saint Joseph**. She considers him an extraordinary earthly father, who acted more than he spoke, living his calling with deep faith. His authenticity and trust in God, despite challenges, make him a strong role model, especially for men. Besides Saint Joseph, Vanessa also mentioned other saints who helped her in different life stages: **Saint Joseph of Cupertino** during exams, **Saint Cecilia** as the patroness of musicians, and **Saint Expeditus** for urgent cases. She emphasized that saints are not idols, but intercessors who bring us closer to God, just as we pray for one another. The host added that his colleague **Sara** also experienced the powerful intercession of Saint Joseph.

sections.subtitle: Od inspiracije do realizacije: Snimanje 'prepeva' uz Domagoja Čondrića
sections.screenshot_description: Vanessa Mioć opisuje proces snimanja svojih 'prepeva' i suradnju s Domagojem Čondrićem.
sections.content: Vanessa Mioć je izrazila želju za snimanjem pjesme posvećene Svetom Josipu, prisjećajući se pjesme koja ju je duboko dirnula. Zatim je opisala proces snimanja svojih posljednjih 'prepeva' (obrada) – pjesama 'Marija', 'Samo Isus može' i 'Golgotha'. Te su joj pjesme došle na srce tijekom klanjanja, i unatoč tome što su već poznate, osjetila je poziv da ih snimi. Inicijativu je preuzela sama, obrativši se **Domagoju Čondriću** s idejom da ih snime uživo. Na njezino iznenađenje, Domagoj je u vrlo kratkom roku uspio okupiti bend i organizirati snimanje, čak i u vrijeme pandemije. Vanessa je pohvalila iznimnu suradnju s cijelim timom, uključujući **Ivana Crnjaka** i **Antonija**, ističući da je sve proteklo bez komplikacija, što je pripisala Božjoj providnosti.

magisterium.assessment: Povezivanje umjetničkog stvaralaštva s euharistijskim klanjanjem odražava duboku duhovnu praksu crpljenja inspiracije iz izvora kršćanskog života.
magisterium.enrichment: Euharistija je vrhunski sakrament Saveza i otajstvo zajedništva koje preobražava vjernike i njihovo djelovanje. Crkva potiče da tekstovi duhovnih pjesama budu crpljeni prvenstveno iz Svetog pisma i liturgijskih izvora kako bi vjerno prenosili kršćansku poruku.
magisterium.assessment_en: Connecting artistic creation with Eucharistic adoration reflects a deep spiritual practice of drawing inspiration from the source of Christian life.
magisterium.enrichment_en: The Eucharist is the supreme sacrament of the Covenant and a mystery of communion which transforms the faithful and their actions. The Church encourages that the texts of spiritual songs be drawn primarily from Sacred Scripture and liturgical sources in order to faithfully convey the Christian message.

sections.subtitle_en: From inspiration to realization: Recording of a 'cover song' with Domagoj Čondrić
sections.screenshot_description_en: Vanessa Mioć describes the process of recording her 'covers' and collaboration with Domagoj Čondrić.
sections.content_en: Vanessa Mioć expressed a desire to record a song dedicated to Saint Joseph, recalling a song that deeply moved her. Then she described the process of recording her latest 'prepeva' (covers) – the songs 'Marija', 'Samo Isus može' and 'Golgotha'. These songs came to her heart during Eucharistic adoration, and despite them already being well-known, she felt a call to record them. She took the initiative herself, approaching **Domagoj Čondrić** with the idea to record them live. To her surprise, Domagoj managed to gather a band and organize the recording in a very short time, even during the pandemic. Vanessa praised the exceptional cooperation with the entire team, including **Ivan Crnjak** and **Antonio**, emphasizing that everything went smoothly, which she attributed to God's providence.

sections.subtitle: Duboka povezanost s pjesmama i sjećanje na oca
sections.screenshot_description: Vanessa Mioć emotivno govori o pjesmama 'Vjerujem' i 'Imaš Oca' te utjecaju očeve smrti.
sections.content: Vanessa Mioć je objasnila da svaku pjesmu doživljava kao dijete, ne snimajući ih samo da bi popunila album, već se moleći i duboko proživljavajući svaku tematiku. Njezin cilj je da se slušatelji mogu poistovjetiti s porukom pjesama i pronaći sebe u odnosu s Bogom. Među najdražima su joj 'Vjerujem', koja je podsjeća na važnost vjere i molitve 'Pomozi mojoj nevjeri', te 'Imaš Oca', koja joj je posebno bliska zbog ranog gubitka zemaljskog oca u dobi od dvanaest godina. Spomenula je i pjesme 'Bog je Vjeran' (s **Ramarinom**) i 'Tišinu' (s **Đurom**). Pjesma 'Imaš Oca' često izaziva snažne emocije tijekom izvedbi, što je za Vanessu uvijek izazov da zadrži suze.

magisterium.assessment: Osobno proživljavanje duhovne glazbe kao sredstva za produbljivanje odnosa s Bogom u potpunosti je u skladu s katoličkom tradicijom.
magisterium.enrichment: Crkva potiče religiozno pjevanje kao sredstvo kojim se glasovi vjernika uzdižu Bogu, pod uvjetom da su tekstovi u skladu s naukom i nadahnuti Svetim pismom. Molitva 'Pomozi mojoj nevjeri' odražava biblijsku poniznost pred Božjom svemoći.
magisterium.assessment_en: Personal experiencing of spiritual music as a means for deepening the relationship with God is fully in accordance with Catholic tradition.
magisterium.enrichment_en: The Church encourages religious singing as a means by which the voices of the faithful are raised to God, provided that the texts are in accordance with the teaching and inspired by Holy Scripture. The prayer 'Help my unbelief' reflects biblical humility before God's omnipotence.

sections.subtitle_en: Deep connection with songs and and memory of father
sections.screenshot_description_en: Vanessa Mioć speaks emotionally about the songs 'I Believe' and 'You Have a Father' and the influence of her father's death.
sections.content_en: Vanessa Mioć explained that she experiences every song as a child, not recording them just to fill an album, but praying and deeply experiencing every theme. Her goal is for listeners to be able to identify with the message of the songs and find themselves in a relationship with God. Among her favorites are 'Vjerujem' (I Believe), which reminds her of the importance of faith and prayer, 'Pomozi mojoj nevjeri' (Help My Unbelief), and 'Imaš Oca' (You Have a Father), which is particularly close to her due to the early loss of her earthly father at the age of twelve. She also mentioned the songs 'Bog je Vjeran' (God is Faithful) (with **Ramarina**) and 'Tišinu' (Silence) (with **Đuro**). The song 'Imaš Oca' (You Have a Father) often evokes strong emotions during performances, which is always a challenge for Vanessa to hold back tears.

sections.subtitle: Očev duh: Pjesma, ples i neopterećenost kao nasljeđe
sections.screenshot_description: Vanessa Mioć prisjeća se oca i njegovog utjecaja na njezinu osobnost.
sections.content: Vanessa Mioć je s nježnošću govorila o svom ocu, prisjećajući se brojnih lijepih trenutaka. Posebno je istaknula njegov ponos i podršku, te način na koji ju je od malih nogu tretirao kao odraslu osobu, potičući otvoren razgovor. Njezin otac je obožavao pjevati i plesati, često spontano, čak i u javnosti, te je bio majstor imitacije. Vanessa i njezina sestra naslijedile su od njega tu neopterećenost i želju da se ljudi oko njih osjećaju dobro. Otac ju je naučio voziti bicikl i rolati, a također i fućkati, što je Vanessa demonstrirala tijekom razgovora. Iako je njihov zajednički period bio kratak, bio je izuzetno intenzivan i na tome je Vanessa zahvalna Bogu.

magisterium.assessment: Iskazivanje poštovanja i ljubavi prema pokojnom ocu te prepoznavanje radosti kao kršćanske vrline usklađeno je s četvrtom Božjom zapovijedi.
magisterium.enrichment: Katolički nauk naglašava da poštovanje prema roditeljima ne prestaje njihovom smrću, već se nastavlja kroz sjećanje i molitvu. Radost i vedrina duha plodovi su Duha Svetoga koji obogaćuju obiteljsko zajedništvo.
magisterium.assessment_en: Showing respect and love towards the deceased father and recognizing joy as a Christian virtue is aligned with the Fourth Commandment.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Catholic teaching emphasizes that respect for parents does not cease with their death, but continues through remembrance and prayer. Joy and serenity of spirit are fruits of the Holy Spirit which enrich family communion.

sections.subtitle_en: Father's spirit: Song, dance and carefreeness as legacy
sections.screenshot_description_en: Vanessa Mioć remembers her father and his influence on her personality.
sections.content_en: Vanessa Mioć spoke tenderly about her father, recalling numerous beautiful moments. She particularly highlighted his pride and support, and the way he treated her as an adult from a young age, encouraging open conversation. Her father loved to sing and dance, often spontaneously, even in public, and was a master of imitation. Vanessa and her sister inherited from him that unburdenedness and the desire for people around them to feel good. Her father taught her to ride a bicycle and rollerblade, and also to whistle, which Vanessa demonstrated during the conversation. Although their time together was short, it was extremely intense, and for that, Vanessa is grateful to God.

sections.subtitle: Zdravica u spomen na oca: Vino kao simbol zajedništva i sjećanja
sections.screenshot_description: Voditelj i Vanessa Mioć otvaraju bocu vina i nazdravljaju u spomen na Vanessinog oca.
sections.content: Vanessa Mioć je potvrdila da je i njezin otac volio vino i dobru hranu, što je obiteljska crta. Voditelj je ponudio dvije boce vina – **Teran** iz **Motovuna** i **Pošip** iz **Kraljevskih vinograda** – te je Vanessa odabrala Teran. Nakon što su otvorili bocu, voditelj je predložio zdravicu u spomen na Vanessinog oca, **Pericu**, kojeg su svi zvali **Pepo**. Vanessa je s osmijehom prihvatila, a voditelj je istaknuo da je vino lagano i pitko, idealno za druženje nakon koncerta. Ovaj spontani trenutak dijeljenja vina poslužio je kao dirljiv podsjetnik na obiteljske vrijednosti i sjećanje na voljene.

magisterium.assessment: Vino kao simbol zajedništva i sjećanja na pokojne prihvatljivo je u kulturnom kontekstu, dok god se zadržava kršćanski pijetet.
magisterium.enrichment: Iako se vino u najuzvišenijem smislu veže uz Euharistiju kao 'Gospodnju večeru', ono u kršćanskoj tradiciji također simbolizira radost i zajedništvo ljudske obitelji. Dostojanstveno sjećanje na pokojne uz čašu vina dio je mediteranske katoličke kulture.
magisterium.assessment_en: Wine as a symbol of community and remembrance of the deceased is acceptable in a cultural context, as long as Christian piety is maintained.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Although wine in the most sublime sense is linked to the Eucharist as 'the Lord's Supper', it also symbolizes joy and community of the human family in Christian tradition. Dignified remembrance of the deceased with a glass of wine is part of Mediterranean Catholic culture.

sections.subtitle_en: Toast in memory of father: Wine as a symbol of community and remembrance
sections.screenshot_description_en: The host and Vanessa Mioć open a bottle of wine and toast in memory of Vanessa's father.
sections.content_en: Vanessa Mioć confirmed that her father also loved wine and good food, which is a family trait. The host offered two bottles of wine – **Teran** from **Motovun** and **Pošip** from **Kraljevskih vinograda** – and Vanessa chose Teran. After they opened the bottle, the host proposed a toast in memory of Vanessa's father, **Perica**, whom everyone called **Pepo**. Vanessa accepted with a smile, and the host pointed out that the wine was light and drinkable, ideal for socializing after the concert. This spontaneous moment of sharing wine served as a touching reminder of family values and the memory of loved ones.

sections.subtitle: 'Ne boj se': Poruka prepuštanja Bogu za mlade generacije
sections.screenshot_description: Vanessa Mioć dijeli svoju poruku mladima: 'Ne boj se' i prepuštanje Bogu.
sections.content: Voditelj je uputio poruku mladima o važnosti molitve za buduće kršćanske obitelji. Vanessa Mioć je zatim podijelila svoju ključnu poruku, posebno namijenjenu mladima: **'Ne boj se'**. Naglasila je da se Bog brine o nama, podsjećajući na **Psalam 139** koji govori o Božjem poznavanju naših misli i puta. Potaknula je mlade da se ne grče u strahu prilikom donošenja odluka, već da sve predaju Bogu i dopuste Duhu Svetom da ih vodi. Istaknula je da Bog već zna što je bilo, što jest i što će biti, te da je na nama samo da mu dopustimo da bude Bog u našim životima. Ponovila je stih iz svoje pjesme 'Imaš Oca' – 'neke težine nisu za te stvorene' – ohrabrujući na radost i slavljenje, jer Bog želi da budemo najsretniji.

magisterium.assessment: Poruka 'Ne boj se' i oslanjanje na Psalam 139 izravno promiču biblijsku istinu o Božjoj providnosti i sveznanju.
magisterium.enrichment: Psalam 139 snažno ističe Božju prisutnost u svakom trenutku čovjekova života, od začeća u majčinoj utrobi do svakodnevnih misli. Crkva poziva mlade da u tom sveznanju pronađu mir, a ne strah, prepuštajući svoje putove Gospodinu.
magisterium.assessment_en: The message 'Do not be afraid' and reliance on Psalm 139 directly promote the biblical truth about God's providence and omniscience.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Psalm 139 strongly emphasizes God's presence in every moment of human life, from conception in the mother's womb to daily thoughts. The Church invites young people to find peace, not fear, in that omniscience, entrusting their paths to the Lord.

sections.subtitle_en: 'Do not be afraid': Message of surrendering to God for younger generations
sections.screenshot_description_en: Vanessa Mioć shares her message to young people: 'Do not be afraid' and surrender to God.
sections.content_en: The host sent a message to young people about the importance of prayer for future Christian families. Vanessa Mioć then shared her key message, especially intended for young people: **'Do not be afraid'**. She emphasized that God cares for us, recalling **Psalm 139** which speaks of God's knowledge of our thoughts and path. She encouraged young people not to writhe in fear when making decisions, but to surrender everything to God and allow the Holy Spirit to guide them. She pointed out that God already knows what was, what is, and what will be, and that it is up to us only to allow Him to be God in our lives. She repeated a verse from her song 'Imaš Oca' – 'some burdens are not created for you' – encouraging joy and celebration, because God wants us to be the happiest.

sections.subtitle: Pokloni i promišljanja o ženskoj ulozi: Nježnost i autoritet
sections.screenshot_description: Voditelj predaje poklone Vanessi Mioć, a ona govori o ženskoj ulozi.
sections.content: Voditelj je Vanessi Mioć uručio nekoliko poklona: knjigu o deset godina djelovanja udruge **'Hrvatska za život'**, časopis **'Tromjesečnik za život: Pohod'** i svoju knjigu **'Zvrk u Božjim rukama'**. Nakon toga, postavio je pitanje o percepciji muškaraca prema njoj. Vanessa je izrazila želju da bude nježna i zaštićena žena, 'princezica', ali istovremeno i autoritet u onim područjima gdje je to potrebno. Naglasila je da ne želi biti superiorna, već jednostavno moći biti ono što jest, prihvaćajući svoju žensku ulogu. Njezina poruka je da svaka žena može biti nježna, ali i snažna, te da je važno pronaći ravnotežu u tim ulogama.

magisterium.assessment: Iskaz o spoju nježnosti i autoriteta u skladu je s katoličkim poimanjem komplementarnosti i dostojanstva žene.
magisterium.enrichment: Biblijski ideal 'vrsne žene' u Izrekama 31 opisuje ženu koja je istovremeno snažna, poduzetna i puna blagosti. Crkva uči da su muškarac i žena stvoreni s jednakim dostojanstvom, ali u vlastitoj bitnosti, odražavajući Božju mudrost i dobrotu.

citations.document_title: The Holy Bible (The New Revised Standard Version, Catholic Edition (NRSV-CE)), Proverbs 31
Catechism of the Catholic Church

magisterium.assessment_en: A statement about the combination of tenderness and authority is in accordance with the Catholic understanding of complementarity and the dignity of woman.
magisterium.enrichment_en: The biblical ideal of the 'excellent wife' in Proverbs 31 describes a woman who is simultaneously strong, enterprising, and full of gentleness. The Church teaches that man and woman are created with equal dignity, but in their own distinct essence, reflecting God's wisdom and goodness.

sections.subtitle_en: Gifts and reflections on the female role: Tenderness and authority
sections.screenshot_description_en: The host hands over gifts to Vanessa Mioć, and she speaks about the female role.
sections.content_en: The host handed Vanessa Mioć several gifts: a book about ten years of activity of the association **'Hrvatska za život'**, the magazine **'Tromjesečnik za život: Pohod'** and his book **'Zvrk u Božjim rukama'**. After that, he asked a question about men's perception of her. Vanessa expressed a desire to be a gentle and protected woman, a 'little princess', but at the same time an authority in those areas where it is necessary. She emphasized that she does not want to be superior, but simply to be able to be what she is, accepting her female role. Her message is that every woman can be gentle, but also strong, and that it is important to find balance in these roles.

sections.subtitle: Završne riječi i poziv na koncert u Sisku
sections.screenshot_description: Voditelj i Vanessa Mioć se opraštaju i pozivaju na koncert u Sisku.
sections.content: Na kraju razgovora, voditelj je zahvalio Vanessi Mioć na iskrenosti i dubini njezinih misli, pohvalivši i njezinu vanjsku ljepotu. Zaključio je emisiju slavljenjem Boga i Blažene Djevice Marije, te je uputio poziv svim gledateljima na koncert u **Sisku** 23. svibnja. Koncert će okupiti brojne poznate izvođače duhovne glazbe u Hrvatskoj, uključujući i **Marka Perkovića Thompsona**, obećavajući nezaboravno duhovno iskustvo.

magisterium.assessment: Završetak emisije slavljenjem Boga i Marije te poziv na humanitarni koncert odražavaju katoličku duhovnost i brigu za zajedničko dobro.
magisterium.enrichment: Štovanje Blažene Djevice Marije bitan je dio kršćanskog bogoštovlja jer ona savršeno utjelovljuje poslušnost vjere. Sudjelovanje u društvenim i humanitarnim aktivnostima obveza je koja proizlazi iz dostojanstva ljudske osobe i promicanja zajedničkog dobra.

citations.document_title: Catechism of the Catholic Church
Catechism of the Catholic Church
Catechism of the Catholic Church
Catechism of the Catholic Church

magisterium.assessment_en: The end of the broadcast by praising God and Mary and the call for a charity concert reflect Catholic spirituality and care for the common good.
magisterium.enrichment_en: Veneration of the Blessed Virgin Mary is an essential part of Christian worship because she perfectly embodies the obedience of faith. Participation in social and humanitarian activities is an obligation that stems from the dignity of the human person and the promotion of the common good.

sections.subtitle_en: Concluding words and invitation to a concert in Sisak
sections.screenshot_description_en: Host and Vanessa Mioć say goodbye and invite to a concert in Sisak.
sections.content_en: At the end of the conversation, the host thanked Vanessa Mioć for the sincerity and depth of her thoughts, also praising her external beauty. He concluded the show by glorifying God and the Blessed Virgin Mary, and extended an invitation to all viewers to a concert in **Sisak** on May 23. The concert will gather numerous well-known performers of spiritual music in Croatia, including **Marko Perković Thompson**, promising an unforgettable spiritual experience.

iterations.theme_en: Faith, family, music and the personal journey of Vanessa Mioć
